CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, value FLOAT);
SELECT ntile(3, 5) OVER (ORDER BY value) AS bucket FROM test_data;
SELECT ntile(5, 5) OVER (ORDER BY value) AS bucket FROM test_data;
SELECT ntile(1, 1) OVER (ORDER BY value) AS bucket FROM test_data;
SELECT ntile(0, 5) OVER (ORDER BY value) AS bucket FROM test_data;
WITH ranked_data AS (SELECT id, value, ntile(2, 5) OVER (ORDER BY value) AS bucket FROM test_data) SELECT bucket, COUNT(*) FROM ranked_data GROUP BY bucket;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INTEGER, value FLOAT);
SELECT a.id, a.value, ntile(4, 6) OVER (ORDER BY a.value + b.value) AS bucket FROM test_data AS a JOIN additional_data AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT ntile(3, 6) OVER (ORDER BY value) AS bucket FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_data) AS subquery;
SELECT ntile(5, 10) OVER (ORDER BY value) AS bucket FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value > 0) AS subquery;
SELECT MAX(value), ntile(3, 10) OVER (ORDER BY value) AS bucket FROM test_data GROUP BY id;
SELECT ntile(2, COUNT(*)) OVER (ORDER BY value) AS bucket FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value BETWEEN 10 AND 50) AS subquery;
